author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Complete. Defined IssueStatus (Open/Closed/Archived) and Priority (Low/Medium/High/Critical) enums in models.rs with serde, rusqlite ToSql/FromSql, Display, FromStr, and PartialEq<String/str> implementations. Updated ~30 files across models, db, hydration, compaction, checkpoint, issue_file, shared_writer, server handlers, CLI commands, and TUI. Events keep String fields for CRDT log compatibility — parsed at the compaction boundary. All 1665 lib tests pass, binary builds clean.
